title: HMX validate report
description: The validation report the validate verb emits (spec §10.3): {checks, conformant}, additionalProperties:false. conformant is true iff no check that RAN failed (fail-closed). The CLOSED set of check ids + the severity model + --strict are owned by step A8 (OD6); this schema constrains the wire shape only and leaves id as a non-empty string. A8 MAY file a one-field revision (spec §14) to pin id to an enum or add severity. Versioned implicitly by manifest format_version.

check_outcome.title: HMX check outcome
check_outcome.description: One check's recorded result: id + ran/skip + pass/fail/null + depth + opaque detail. A skipped check carries result:null and a non-null detail reason.
